About Me

Dream to reality, reality to digitality.

I am Muhammad Shahrul Mulhim bin Shahrul Azlan — an architecture student at Ungku Omar Polytechnic, Perak, consistently on the Dean's List with a CGPA of 3.79.

Skilled in AutoCAD, Revit, SketchUp, D5 Render, and Photoshop, with a strong interest in advancing my 3D modelling and BIM project coordination capabilities. I work between hand-drawn concepts and fully coordinated BIM documentation.

Beyond design, I bring leadership, attention to detail, and a collaborative mindset — shaped through competitions, community programmes, and five semesters of studio briefs.

Selected Work

Design Studio, semester by semester.

Five semesters of studio briefs — from sketch-based observation to fully resolved, BIM-coordinated buildings.

SEM05
Public · Community3D Model

RRR Zero Waste Market & Learning Hub

A market and learning hub designed around reduce–reuse–recycle principles.

SEM04
Social · Welfare

Tranquility Homeless Training Centre

A training centre concept for the homeless community, framed around calm, dignified spaces.

SEM03
Education · Early Childhood

The Little Uranus Kindergarten

A space-themed kindergarten design exploring playful massing and child-scaled environments.

SEM02
Conceptual · Form Study

Tranquility in Tension

An exploratory studio brief investigating spatial calm against structural tension.

SEM01
Observation · Sketching

Dusit Thani — Concept & Sketch Studies

Foundation-level sketching and concept modelling using the Dusit Thani as reference.

Track Record

Competitions & Recognitions

Representing Ungku Omar Polytechnic at international and national competitions — 7 competitions entered, 3 awards placed.

2024 · InternationalGold Award

Pro Albi — Sustainability in Built Environment

Earned Gold Award at international level for sustainability-focused architectural proposal. Also represented Ungku Omar Polytechnic at the BIM competition in Guizhou, China (2024).

2025 · National1st Place

CIDB IBS NextGen TVET Modular Thinker 2025

First Place at national level with an innovative IBS modular construction concept.

2025 · National3rd Place

Anugerah BIM JKR 2025 — Model Reka Bentuk BIM (Akademik)

Third place for academic BIM building model at national level.

2025 · NationalTop 13

World Skills Malaysia Belia — Digital Construction Category

Highest position among all competing polytechnics in Malaysia.

2025 · National3rd Place

POLYCC Design Fest 2025 RENTAS — Rentas AI (AI Video)

Third place in the AI Video category at POLYCC Design Fest 2025.

2025 · National3rd Place

POLYCC Design Fest 2025 RENTAS — Rentas Warisan (Stage Performance)

Third place in Stage Performance category at national level.

2024/20253rd Place

Best Architectural Design Project Awards

Third place in the Best Architectural Design Project Awards — also awarded Second Place in the 2023/2024 cycle.

2025 · NationalParticipated

POLYCC Design Fest 2025 RENTAS — Rentas Lestari (Recycle Frame)

Participated as leader (Logistics) in the Recycle Frame category and the Madani Heritage Explorace programme.
